title: The Mermaid of Monhegan
author: Barış Kısır
description: A marine biologist on a remote Maine island discovers a creature that should not exist—and must protect it from those who would exploit it.
long_description: Dr. Isabel Wells, a marine biologist grieving a drowned colleague, takes a summer position on Monhegan Island, Maine. There she discovers a relict population of aquatic humanoids—creatures of legend made flesh. When a biotech corporation learns of her discovery, Wells must choose between scientific revelation and the protection of a species that trusts her. A spare, literary novel about wonder, loss, and the cost of knowledge.

characters.Ezra Pridham: Monhegan fisherman, 62, keeper of island secrets
characters.Marcus Killian: VP of Aethelon Biosciences, ruthless corporate executive
characters.Dr. Lena Orloff: Aethelon staff scientist with a troubled conscience
characters.The Creature: Young female mermaid, last of her kind

short_description: A marine biologist on Monhegan Island must protect a hidden aquatic species from scientific exploitation.
